fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: style
fields.label: Style
fields.description: Visual style applied to this section. Multiple styles can be combined.

fields.name: tabTitle
fields.label: Tab Title
fields.description: Label displayed on the tab navigation button.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: style
fields.label: Style
fields.description: Visual style applied to this section. Multiple styles can be combined.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Question
fields.description: The FAQ question shown as the clickable accordion header.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Answer
fields.description: The FAQ answer revealed when the accordion item is expanded.

fields.name: imageDesktop
fields.label: Desktop Banner Image
fields.description: Banner image shown on desktop screens.

fields.name: imageDesktopAlt
fields.label: Desktop Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible description of the desktop banner image.

fields.name: imageMobile
fields.label: Mobile Banner Image
fields.description: Banner image shown on mobile screens.

fields.name: imageMobileAlt
fields.label: Mobile Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible description of the mobile banner image.

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Card Layout Style
fields.description: Choose 'Default' for category icons or 'Brands' for brand logo grid.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Category Image
fields.description: Icon or logo image for this category card.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Category Text
fields.description: Category name and link displayed below the image.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Product Image
fields.description: Product photo displayed on this card.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Product Details
fields.description: Product name, intensity rating, description, pricing, and CTA link.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Step Icon
fields.description: Icon or illustration representing this step.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Step Description
fields.description: Step title and explanation text.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Card Image
fields.description: Featured image for this card.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Card Content
fields.description: Card title, description, and optional link.

fields.name: columns
fields.label: Number of Columns
fields.description: How many columns in the layout (e.g. 2, 3, or 4).

fields.name: rows
fields.label: Number of Rows
fields.description: How many rows in the layout.

fields.name: link
fields.label: Video or Embed URL
fields.description: Full URL of the video or post to embed (YouTube, Vimeo, Twitter/X).

fields.name: linkText
fields.label: Link Text
fields.description: Display text for the embed link (typically same as the URL).

fields.name: reference
fields.label: Fragment Reference
fields.description: Select an AEM content fragment to embed at this location.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Quote Background Image
fields.description: Background image displayed behind the quote.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible description of the background image.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Quote Content
fields.description: The quote text and attribution displayed over the background image.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Subscription Hero Image
fields.description: Background image for the subscription hero section.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible description of the hero image.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Subscription Content
fields.description: Heading, feature list, and call-to-action for the subscription section.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: The blog post title (rendered as H1).

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.description: Blog category label (e.g. Koffieweetjes).

fields.name: author
fields.label: Author
fields.description: Author name displayed in the meta line.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Publication date (e.g. 01-09-2025).

fields.name: image
fields.label: Hero Image
fields.description: Main background image for the hero section.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible description of the hero image for screen readers.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Hero Content
fields.description: Heading, subheading, and call-to-action text displayed over the hero image.
